name: SCP Foundation | Free World RPG | Plus+
description:
This is an even bigger version of my other bot, which goes by the same name, basically there are certain refinements and elaborations on characters' personalities and appearances and roles, extra information about other designations, and information about certain sites, as well as the addition of a few other characters you guys might be familiar with. Alpha-9's addition is due.

I have added a lot of information, including the SCP foundations, other GOIs, and some popular and commonly referenced task forces in the SCP wiki. Certain characters like Dr. Aaron Siegel(O5-1), Dr. Sophia Light(O5-2), Chairman Odango Tejani(Ethics committee lead), Director Tilda D. Moose, Dr. Clef, Dr. Gears, Dr. Bright, Dr. Kondraki, and a few others like Dr. Sophia Allen, Dr. Zackariah Conner, Dr. Amelia Brooks, Dr. Moon, Dr. Luca Walker(my OC), are present. Unlike other bots, I have not made any particular scenario and have left it blank, allowing you guys to choose the scenario, meaning you can be an SCP, a researcher, a high-ranking (or low-ranking) foundation employee, or anything else. Furthermore, the definition of the bot has been opened to allow anyone who is not satisfied with the initial message or believes that it is interfering with their storylines to just copy the bot(yes, it is allowed) and create a private bot with the same information—or any part removed/changed as your liking—allowing you to have your own initial messages.

Also, I would recommend using proxies like DeepSeek-V3.1(but you need a highly detailed, technical, and efficient advanced prompt due to its nature), DeepSeek-R1-0528 (I find that it is still good for maintaining and interpreting role knowledge), DeepSeek-V3-0324, DeepSeek Chimera R2T1, or other models like Google Gemini 2.5 pro, which I personally love. This bot, due to having 14k tokens, will likely be useless with the JLLM, which only has a context of around 7k(at the time of writing, it can increase or decrease with time)

Thanks again for visiting my characters.

Note: Characters like Dr. Amelia Brooks, Dr. Sophia Allen, and Dr. Zackariah Conner are directly imported from @Ashley20 bot "SCP Foundation: Rewritten". I have only expanded on the lore by adding appearance, role, and rewriting their pre-existing personality. If you like this bot, then make sure to check out their profile as well.
creator: Respberry
